title: S + get/cause + O + to V（使役動詞）

formulas.zh: 使役某人做某事（較口語、費力感）
導致某人/物做某事（較正式、客觀因果）

explanation: get 和 cause 都是使役動詞，後接受詞加不定詞。get 強調透過說服、勸導等努力使他人做事，帶有口語色彩；cause 表達客觀的因果關係，較正式。兩者皆須接 to V（不同於 make/have 接原形動詞）。注意受詞必須是人或有行為能力的對象，to V 前不可省略 to，否則違反句型規則。

examples.eng: I couldn't get my friend to believe my incredible story about the accident.
examples.chi: 我無法讓我的朋友相信我關於這場事故的不可思議故事。

examples.eng: The heavy rain caused the baseball game to be postponed until next week.
examples.chi: 大雨導致棒球比賽被延期到下週。

examples.eng: What finally got him to make a decision after months of hesitation?
examples.chi: 經過數月的猶豫後，是什麼終於促使他做出決定？

examples.eng: The new policy caused many employees to reconsider their career paths.
examples.chi: 新政策導致許多員工重新思考他們的職業道路。

extension.tip: get 與 cause 的關鍵區別：get 常指「通過勸說、努力或技巧」使人做事，帶有主觀意圖；cause 指「客觀原因」導致結果發生，通常不含意圖。另外，make 和 have 後接原形動詞（V），不能加 to，這是最常見的混淆點。

examples.test: I got him _____ the project. (make vs. to complete)
examples.result: → I got him to complete the project.（正確）；I got him complete... 或 I made him to complete...（皆錯誤）

examples.test: The accident caused three people _____ to hospital. (去醫院)
examples.result: → The accident caused three people to go to hospital.（正確）；caused...go（缺 to，錯誤）

examples.test: She managed _____ her parents to allow her to travel abroad.
examples.result: → She managed to get her parents to allow her to travel abroad.（正確使役鏈結）

extension.note: get + to V = 說服式使役；cause + to V = 因果式使役；make/have + V = 原形使役。三者 to 的有無是判別關鍵。

exercises.sentence: The teacher couldn't get the students to remain silent during the test.
exercises.translation: 老師無法讓學生在考試期間保持安靜。

parts: down, which blocked the main road.
exercises.sentence: The severe storm caused several trees to fall down, which blocked the main road.
exercises.translation: 嚴重的風暴導致幾棵樹倒下，阻塞了主要道路。

parts: attend the family dinner by promising her a reward.
exercises.sentence: He finally got his sister to attend the family dinner by promising her a reward.
exercises.translation: 他終於通過許諾獎勵讓妹妹參加家庭晚宴。

exercises.sentence: The company's environmental policy caused all departments to reduce their carbon footprint.
exercises.translation: 公司的環保政策導致所有部門減少碳足跡。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的使役動詞形式來完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: The teacher tried to _______ the students to submit their homework on time.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。get 是使役動詞，後接受詞加 to V，因此為 get the students to submit。A 缺少 to，違反 get 的句型規則。C 和 D 中 cause 也需加 to V，但在「說服他人」的語境中應用 get 而非 cause，cause 用於客觀因果關係。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據語境選擇適當的使役動詞及結構
mc_exercises.question_eng: The doctor managed to _______ her patient to quit smoking through consistent counseling.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C。「透過勸導使他人做某事」應用 get to V（強調說服努力），因此為 get her patient to quit。A 中 cause 用於客觀因果，不適合勸導語境。B 缺少 to。D 中 make 後接原形動詞，不能加 to，違反使役動詞規則。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷哪個選項正確表達客觀因果關係的使役含義
mc_exercises.question_eng: The scandal _______ several government officials to resign from their positions immediately.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。表達客觀因果關係（醜聞導致辭職）應用 cause to V，因此為 caused to resign。A 中 led cause 是雙重動詞錯誤。C 中 got 用於勸導而非客觀因果。D 中 made 後接原形動詞，不能加 to。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複合句型：區辨 get/cause 在被動語態及語境的運用差異
mc_exercises.question_eng: Although the manager tried hard to _______ the reluctant employee to accept the transfer, the family circumstances _______ him to decline the offer finally.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。第一空「說服員工接受」用 get to accept（強調說服努力）；第二空「家庭情況導致拒絕」用 caused（客觀因果關係）。A 中第一個 get accept 缺少 to。C 中 cause to accept 不符合勸導語境。D 中 made 後不能加 to。
